title: mentha arvensis f. subrotunda
intro: Mentha arvensis f. subrotunda, also known as Japanese peppermint, is a variant of the common mint plant (Mentha arvensis) that is native to Japan and parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis f. subrotunda include relief from nausea, headaches, and fever, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to make topical creams, salves, and oral remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
